name: strategist
description: v0.2.1 — A structured strategic-thinking system: take a problem through one repeatable loop — Define, Split, Analyse, Insight, Story, Decide, Act — pulling the right framework from a 70-framework library at each stage, and pressure-testing your reasoning before you commit. Produces a working record and a clean reader-facing brief. Standalone; runs on its own. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace.
